remaining_tasks.name: Alltime aggregation D-19 (StandingsService + DriverRankingService behavior change)

human_actions_pending.action: Wave 8 / 62-07 is autonomous=false — manual playwright-cli sweep across 5 page types in BOTH LEAGUE and GROUPS fixtures, Desktop (1280x800) + Mobile (390x844). Capture screenshots for v1.9 retrospective.
human_actions_pending.context: playwright-cli is part of the project's dev workflow per CLAUDE.md; final sweep before milestone closeout.

decisions.decision: D-20: 5 page generator beans + SiteSlugger + TemplateWriter + 4 view records + GenerationContext
decisions.rationale: Reduces orchestrator from 868 → 568 LOC; matches admin-layer service decomposition pattern

decisions.decision: Rule-1 fix in StandingsService — added .thenComparing(shortName) deterministic tiebreaker on 3 sort sites
decisions.rationale: Pre-existing HashMap-iteration non-determinism made SC4 byte-identity literally unprovable. Required to test the phase's core invariant.

decisions.decision: Re-captured single-league-standings.html golden baseline. New MD5 5be57f01bba8f1e91f4db4fd95f2eada (file size unchanged 14054 bytes)
decisions.rationale: Original baseline was unreproducible due to non-deterministic sort. Only row order for tied teams changed (now alphabetic by shortName).

decisions.decision: D-08 vs UI-SPEC line 333 reconciliation — D-08 governs only standings-playoff.html (NEVER generated). driver-ranking-playoff.html IS generated when PLAYOFF phase has driver data.
decisions.rationale: Two different page types; UI-SPEC explicitly authorizes PLAYOFF driver-ranking variant.

decisions.decision: Open Question 2 lock — legacy matchdays.html lists REGULAR-phase matchdays only
decisions.rationale: Mirrors standings legacy = REGULAR-combined for consistency

decisions.decision: Phase Breakdown gated by server-side showPhaseBreakdown flag (true ⇔ ≥2 phases)
decisions.rationale: Enables D-13/D-14/D-15 without per-phase URL forks (D-16). Single-LEAGUE seasons render byte-identical to today (SC4).

decisions.decision: D-22 phase-aware empty-state banner + D-26 a11y attrs (role=tablist, role=tab, aria-selected)

next_action: Run /gsd-execute-phase 62 to resume from Wave 6 (Plan 62-05). Plan 62-05 is a TRACKED BEHAVIOR CHANGE (D-19): StandingsService.calculateAlltimeStandings + DriverRankingService.calculateAlltimeRanking will aggregate across ALL phases (REGULAR + PLAYOFF + PLACEMENT), not REGULAR-only. Public method signatures stay unchanged. Add new RaceResultRepository.findByRaceMatchdaySeasonIdIn finder. Document behavior change in plan SUMMARY for v1.9 release notes.
context_notes: Phase 62 is mid-execution under /gsd-execute-phase auto-mode. 5 of 8 waves done in this session, all green: ./mvnw verify 1211/1211 with JaCoCo 85.80% line coverage. The pattern across waves 2-5 is: phase-tab-row CSS (added in wave 2 only, reused since), Thymeleaf markup mirroring, helper unit tests asserting SC4 byte-identity, server-side aggregation in the per-page generator. Wave 6 is the FIRST behavior-change plan in this phase — needs explicit unit tests proving PLAYOFF points enter alltime totals. Wave 7 builds the cross-cutting regression IT (SC1-SC5, D-22, D-26). Wave 8 is the manual playwright sweep — autonomous=false, requires user checkpoint.
